data.content:
Shipment completed.

Final branch state
- origin/main now points to 728cb837760c685efc955acb63ac22b064d8451d
- Feature branch remains available at origin/worktree-foolery-d2ea-execution-plan-docs

Remote verification
- git ls-remote origin refs/heads/main returned 728cb837760c685efc955acb63ac22b064d8451d
- GitHub combined status for the shipped commit returned no statuses
- GitHub workflow runs for the shipped commit returned no runs

Interpretation
- Shipment to remote main succeeded.
- There are currently no GitHub status checks or workflow runs attached to this commit, so there was no remote CI to wait on or verify green.
